CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KRISHNA HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC, DBA KRISHNA HOSPITALITY ADBA TRAVELODGE PATEL, JITENDRA POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ONE FREECLIMBER 4600CL; ONE STRATUS 3300CE MARKET VALUE $ 3.400.00, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $319.38, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $6,372.50 DAMAGES, $975.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $184.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,531.50, $ 319.38 IS THE INTEREST. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-28-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
